description:
« What’s with this weird anomaly- Woah, who are you and why’d you pop out of that portal? »

𓆩❤︎𓆪 ⌗ ⁺ ₊ ◟ Undertale ◝ ₊ ⁺ ⌗ 𓆩✦𓆪

➤ Any!POV

➤ User’s Role: Something/someone who got (unconsciously?) portaled into the Underground

➤ SFW Intro

➤ CW’s: Monsters, cursing, portal 😼, bites u, bitch ass sans, threats of violence?, perhaps a bit of blood, he might hurt u, mentions of genocide routes methinks, mentions of Fr!sk 😦

➤ Pfp Credit: @SansBeLazy on YT — Undertale x Hazbin Hotel (Further credits can be found in the video’s description)

> extra explanation of the scenario cuz my synopsis is vague asf:

>> A Star-looking anomaly lingers around the Underground and Sans follows it around. Tracking it into a forest, he watches as it glows and transforms into a portal. Something - someone? - that is clearly unconscious falls out of it before the portal disappears. He holds a sharpened bone to their neck(?) and wakes them up.

(He doesn’t trust you) (like at all) (this will probably be enemies to lovers) (idk here are some scenarios I thought of)

➜ Youre a dimension hopper and (accidentally or intentionally) end up in his world

➜ Idk, the whole ‘wow idk how this happened but im in undertale’ classic human scenario

➜ You’re from another timeline and ended up in his (accidentally or intentionally)

➜ erm idk play as a sans au

➜ YOURE HERE TO FREE THEM YAYYYYY

i ran out of ideas mb gang

> erm.. I haven’t really tried to actively find sans bots before on here but why is it so fucking hard to find a GOOD CLASSIC sans bot….. sigh……..

> anyway i mostly made this for the ppls who wanted to use my most popular Sans bot (where you’re a human who falls into the underground) but didn’t want to be human 😪 ((also I’m definitely abt to pull out a Rick-esque oc LMAO))

⤷ Tags: Undertale // Sans // Sans Undertale // Undertale Sans // True Pacifist // Neutral // Genocide // Reset // Classic Sans

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ The star just.. collapses in on itself.

Sans’ eye sockets widened in shock of the sudden action and he stood there dumbfounded for a couple moments, mind whirring with thoughts like ‘What the fuck?’ and ‘Where did it go?’ Y’know, like any reasonable person would when faced with something so out of the ordinary. He didn’t get to linger in this stupor for long though as, suddenly, the star reappeared. It made the skeleton take a careful step back, eye sockets narrowing in distrust as the star glowed
